name_cn:
Top-tier replica with full packaging
In stock!!️
Newest Spring/Summer Besace series, stylish shape with subtle vintage charm, unique, classic blue Oblique Monogram fabric, flap accented with a striking gold-finish metal letter logo, spacious and practical interior, paired with an adjustable calfskin shoulder strap, can be worn over the shoulder or crossbody, matches various casual or elegant looks for the season
size: 24*6*13cm
